### 2141132
**Care Bears: Unlock the Magic S01E23 - One Wise Bear**  
🆕 TV-Y7 🔓 11:02  
⌛ June 3, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=10000000000&titleid=2141132&mediaid=9768b2d8da0e3f196094639935401a1403ef76fe) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/care-bears-unlock-the-magic/one-wise-bear-episode.html  
seriesid=`2141109` titleid=`2141132` mediaid=`9768b2d8da0e3f196094639935401a1403ef76fe`  
_The Bears become lost in the Valley of Whispering Winds, where voices whisper in their ears and make them lose faith in themselves. Racing to their rescue, Tenderheart leads them to the only one who knows the antidote to the words of the Winds: a mysterious old bear of great wisdom who teaches them a valuable lesson about listening to your heart._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141132_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141132_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141132_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141132_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141132_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141132_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141132_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141132_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141132_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141132_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141132_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141132_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141132_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141132_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141132_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141132_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141132_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141132_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141132_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141132_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
